mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted, type, subtype, score, user_id, `log_desc` AS log_desc, remark, vip_bonus_rate, lianghao_bonus_rate, base_score

a.id, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.create_by, a.update_by, a.is_deleted, a.type, a.subtype, a.score, a.user_id, a.`log_desc` AS log_desc, a.remark, a.vip_bonus_rate, a.lianghao_bonus_rate, a.base_score
mapper.select: SELECT m.id AS userId, m.idno AS idno, m.lianghao AS lianghao, ( SELECT d.credit_score FROM t_member_details d WHERE d.user_id = m.id AND d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS totalCreditScore FROM t_member m WHERE m.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id FROM t_member
AND idno LIKE CONCAT('%', #{idno}, '%')
AND lianghao LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lianghao}, '%')
LIMIT 1

SELECT , m.idno AS idno, m.lianghao AS lianghao, ( SELECT d.credit_score FROM t_member_details d WHERE d.user_id = a.user_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS total_credit_score FROM t_credit_score_log a LEFT JOIN t_member m ON m.id = a.user_id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
